title: Tome IX Act 1: The Measuring of the Dawn

story.text:
# 📖 Tome IX Act 1: The Measuring of the Dawn
**act** · shared · narrative

Tome IX opens. Eos 🌅, Dokimé 🪨 and Poros 🛤️ are admitted; the Horizon District opens at V35. Resource estimation enters as a durability signal via the ecdsa.fail benchmark; Mosca's inequality (X+Y>Z) is read aloud. The Last Premine is told. Carries C67-C71.
> *To measure the dawn is not to attack the night.*

story.title: Read the full text
story.text: the full prose of this act, in the Tomes.
